---
title: "Research highlights"
description: >
  Key findings from the GEMMA project, written for a broad audience.
  Each highlight is available to download as a PDF policy brief.
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "!index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  feed: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

These pages summarise significant findings from the GEMMA project. 

Each highlight can be downloaded as a PDF policy brief using the link at the top
of the page.
